    10 Cloverfield Lane<\/h4>

    A young woman wakes up after a terrible accident to find that she\u2019s\u2026 locked in a cellar with a doomsday prepper,\u2026 who insists that he saved her life and that the world outside is uninhabitable following an apocalyptic catastrophe. Uncertain what to believe, the woman
